10045153968321.scentJourney: Opens with a burst of refreshing citrus and mint, transitions into a heart of geranium and black tea, and settles into a warm, woody base of patchouli, amber, and cedar.
10045153968321.brandStory: Antonio Banderas Fragrances is a collaboration between the famous Spanish actor and the perfume company Puig. The brand focuses on creating accessible, charismatic scents that reflect the actor's own personality and Mediterranean roots.
10045153968321.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For EDT concentration, reapply as needed throughout the day.

10089608904897.name: Seductive I'm Yours
10089608904897.desc: A captivating floral fruity fragrance for women featuring notes of peony, passionfruit, tiare flower, and vanilla.
10089608904897.scentJourney: Opens with a bright, fruity-floral burst of peony and passionfruit, transitioning into a tropical heart of tiare, lily, orchid, and magnolia, settling into a warm, sweet base of vanilla, musk, and woods.
10089608904897.brandStory: Guess is an American clothing brand and retailer known for its iconic denim and lifestyle products. The brand expanded into fragrances in the 1980s, offering accessible, trend-focused scents that reflect the youthful and glamorous spirit of the Guess fashion house.
10089608904897.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. As an EDT, it can be applied more liberally than an EDP, but avoid rubbing the skin after application to maintain the integrity of the scent.

10475880513729.name: Bad Boy Cobalt Elixir
10475880513729.desc: An intense, aromatic interpretation of the original Bad Boy Cobalt, featuring a fiery blend of sage, black truffle, and resinous woods.
10475880513729.scentJourney: Opens with vibrant sage and black pepper, transitions into a rich heart of black truffle and resinous woods, and settles into a warm, smoky base of vanilla and frankincense.
10475880513729.brandStory: Carolina Herrera is a prestigious fashion house founded by the Venezuelan-American designer of the same name. Known for its blend of classic elegance and modern sophistication, the brand has expanded into a globally recognized fragrance house, famous for its iconic, sculptural perfume bottles.
10475880513729.usage: Spray onto pulse points, including wrists, neck, and chest, to allow the fragrance to develop with your body heat.

10530097660097.name: Viva La Juicy Neon
10530097660097.desc: A vibrant and alluring Floral Fruity fragrance featuring notes of pink grapefruit, orange blossom, tonka bean, and woodsy notes.
10530097660097.scentJourney: Opens with a zesty burst of pink grapefruit, transitions into a heart of orange blossom, and settles into a warm base of tonka bean and woodsy notes.
10530097660097.brandStory: Juicy Couture is a glamorous, irreverent, and fun lifestyle brand known for its iconic velour tracksuits and signature fragrances. The brand embodies a cheeky, trendsetting spirit that has defined a generation of fashion and beauty enthusiasts.
10530097660097.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears for optimal scent projection. Avoid rubbing the fragrance into the skin to maintain the integrity of the notes.

10561937277121.name: Le Male Elixir
10561937277121.desc: An intense and seductive fragrance blending warm woods, tropical tonka bean, legendary lavender, and seductive benzoin.
10561937277121.scentJourney: Opens with a fresh aromatic burst of lavender and mint, transitioning into a rich, sweet heart of vanilla and benzoin, settling into a deep, warm base of honey, tonka bean, and tobacco.
10561937277121.brandStory: Jean Paul Gaultier is a legendary French fashion house known for its avant-garde designs and iconic sailor-themed branding. The fragrance line, launched in the 1990s, has become a staple in the industry, celebrated for its provocative marketing and distinctively shaped bottles.
10561937277121.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. Due to the high concentration of a Parfum, a little goes a long way.

10589266870465.name: Paradoxe Virtual Flower
10589266870465.desc: A floral musky fragrance that captures the luminous scent of Jasmine, utilizing AI technology to recreate the scent of the flower.
10589266870465.scentJourney: Opens with a bright, zesty bergamot, transitioning into a modern, airy jasmine and neroli heart, settling into a soft, skin-like musk and ambrette base.
10589266870465.brandStory: Prada is an iconic Italian luxury fashion house founded in 1913, known for its intellectual approach to fashion and avant-garde designs. The fragrance line reflects the brand's commitment to innovation, quality, and the exploration of contrasts between tradition and modernity.
10589266870465.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For best results, apply to hydrated skin to improve longevity.
10589266870465.perfumer: Nadège Le Garlantezec, Shyamala Maisondieu, Antoine Maisondieu

10594402238657.name: Holy Neroli
10594402238657.desc: A radiant, unisex citrus floral fragrance that captures the luminous beauty of Mediterranean orange groves with elegant warmth and subtle sweetness.
10594402238657.scentJourney: Opens with a bright, sparkling burst of neroli, zesty bitter orange, and sunny Sicilian bergamot. The heart blooms into a lush, romantic floral core of rich Tunisian orange blossom intertwined with velvety Bulgarian rose and dry cedar. It settles into a soft, comforting base of clean musk, warm amber, and delicate vanilla sugar.
10594402238657.brandStory: Founded by Pierre Montale in 2003 in Paris, the house is inspired by the perfumer's time spent in Saudi Arabia creating fragrances for nobility. Montale is renowned for its high-quality, intense, and long-lasting oriental-inspired compositions, often housed in signature aluminum bottles designed to protect the precious essences from light.
10594402238657.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For best results, spray onto clean, hydrated skin.

10627033825473.name: Angham
10627033825473.desc: An Oriental Vanilla fragrance for women and men, featuring a harmonious blend of warm spices, sweet florals, and a rich vanilla base.
10627033825473.scentJourney: Opens with a vibrant, zesty blend of ginger, mandarin, and pink pepper. The heart develops into a creamy, sweet gourmand mix of lavender, praline, cacao, and jasmine, settling into a smooth, warm base of vanilla, amber, and musk.
10627033825473.brandStory: Lattafa Perfumes is a prominent fragrance house based in the United Arab Emirates, known for producing high-quality, affordable perfumes that blend traditional Middle Eastern perfumery with modern, global trends. The brand has gained international popularity for its diverse range of scents and stylish, often opulent, bottle designs.
10627033825473.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For longer-lasting scent, apply to moisturized skin.

10627034939585.name: Her Confession
10627034939585.desc: An intoxicating fragrance featuring a blend of cinnamon, floral heart notes, and a warm, sensual base of tonka, musk, and vanilla.
10627034939585.brandStory: Lattafa Perfumes is a prominent Dubai-based fragrance house known for producing high-quality, affordable perfumes inspired by luxury scents. They have established a significant global presence by blending traditional Middle Eastern perfumery techniques with modern fragrance trends.
10627034939585.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For best results, apply to moisturized skin to help the fragrance last longer.

10847676170433.name: Emporio Armani Diamonds
10847676170433.desc: A sparkling, gourmand-floral fragrance that blends fruity notes of litchi and raspberry with a heart of rose and a warm, sweet base.

10847676170433.brandStory: Giorgio Armani is a legendary Italian fashion house known for its timeless elegance and minimalist aesthetic. The Emporio Armani line focuses on a younger, more contemporary audience, offering fragrances that are modern, accessible, and stylish.
